title: Brachiaria praetervisa
taxonomy: Brachiaria praetervisa is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Brachiaria, which is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant is further classified as a member of the tribe Andropogoneae, which is a group of grasses known for their economic importance. Brachiaria praetervisa is an annual or perennial grass that is widely distributed in tropical Asia. It is often found growing in areas with high temperatures and moderate to high rainfall.
